Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Shera]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Shera is a Consultant who attacked Calder's group while they were sleeping and took his wife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Shera is a Consultant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Shera is a potential threat mentioned by Tristania.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Shera is a character who wants Naberius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Shera struck Tristania’s coat-shrouded back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Urzaia lands near Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Shera is an Izyrian gladiator and a Consultant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Shera attacked Calder and Andel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Shera is a Consultant assassin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Shera is a blond Consultant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Shera carried Nakothi’s Heart to Lucan for inspection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Shera is a Consultant who wields a bronze blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Lucan has done everything for Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Shera is a figure in black with a bronze knife and a silver throwing blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Shera is a blond Consultant with bright orange eyes and vertical slit pupils.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Shera wields an old bronze knife and an Awakened emerald blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Calder wishes Shera luck in a fight.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — Shera is the Knife in killing operations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — Shera is a character who has completed the assassination of Kamba Nomen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — Shera was sitting on top of a cage with a bloody knife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Shera is a character who studies client files.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Shera is a character who heard Anthem User laughing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Shera killed someone she thought deserved it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Shera used to be a beggar on the streets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Shera carries a small knife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Shera has a hidden pocket sewn into the inside of her clothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Shera has pulled a knife on Kerian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Shera was born in the underside of the Capital and worked cleaning up the city under Maxwell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Shera carries a bronze shear in her right hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Shera possesses a paralyzing needle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Shera is a character who left her workshop.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Shera possesses a bronze shear on her left that she never draws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Shera is a member of the Guild's order of assassins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Shera was conditioned by Maxwell's attacks to wake and respond to even the slightest sounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Shera is interested in breakfast more than Guild history.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Shera uses a stolen knife to attack the prisoner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — Shera seized the prisoner's wrist and pushed it against his body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Shera visited a familiar clearing in the forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Shera possesses a left-hand shear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Shera is a person who can use shears as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Shera is a student training to be a Gardener.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Shera is an apprentice of Ayana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Shera is not a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Shera is a student described as lazy and unpredictable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Shera's shears are invested with Intent from generations of Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Shera was being treated for severe burns in an infirmary.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Shera uses a knife and shears in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Shera uses a spade as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Shera's second shear has Intent bound in the blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Shera possesses a bronze blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Shera has previously taken a piece of a Great Elder back to the Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Shera wears Gardener blacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Shera is a Gardener who uses a bronze blade and invested shears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Shera has a wounded shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Shera carries the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Shera possesses a shear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Shera has a blade on her left side that whispers laughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — Shera watched Albadol Crane from a cramped trunk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Shera possesses a shear with enough Intent to break through a lock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Shera was once commanded by the Emperor to protect the Empire even from himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Shera is determined to see Calder dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 18''' — Shera can go dark and cold, causing the person Lucan knows to disappear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Shera was adopted into the Consultants by Kerian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Shera is someone Lucan seeks to protect and a prospective Consultant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Shera is the intended user of the weapon Syphren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — Shera is a professional who knows ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — Shera is a Gardener with Consultant training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Shera is heading for Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Lucan intends to deliver the knife to Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Shera ran deeper into the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 22''' — Shera could hear a faint heartbeat echoing through the whole island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Shera wears a mask over her nose and mouth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Shera is a fighter who uses shears and spades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Shera was stopped by Calder Marten in the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Shera caught her Awakened shear out of the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Shera possesses two shears: a bronze one in her right hand and a green one in her left.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Shera uses alchemy flares.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Shera's combat style involves using spades, needles, and hidden daggers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Shera's expression is described as absolutely blank and her eyes as dead as a snake's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Shera is on Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Shera can steal power from Elderspawn, creating green wisps around her body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Shera can create a pale spirit of a fireball.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Shera used her shears to attempt to strike the Elder while falling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — Shera received a small scroll tied with a green ribbon from a Waverider scout.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Shera is mentioned by Meia as someone who would have killed the captain immediately.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Shera is an assassin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Shera possesses an Awakened weapon and may be a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Shera is a Consultant and an ally of Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Shera killed Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Shera is considered a great threat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Shera pushed Jerri over The Testament's railing into the ocean.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Shera is a Gardener and an assassin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Shera is a professional who enters and exits rooms before her client.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — Shera has experienced Maxwell's ambushes and years of Gardener training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Shera is working toward something.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Shera is a character who uses shears and bronze blades in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Shera is a pet assassin of the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Shera is a Soulbound Consultant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Shera carries two heavy knives dense with Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Shera possesses Soulbound powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Shera's job is to kill the Emperor before he becomes a threat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Shera spoke up and named Ach'magut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — Shera uses a poisoned needle to kill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Shera hurled a green knife toward the door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Shera swayed over Darius with stolen energy tingling inside her skin before collapsing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Shera collapsed after stating she was getting tired.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Shera killed the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Shera is an associate of Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Shera fights blade-to-blade with Calder Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Shera is a Gardener who trains with Jarelys Teach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Shera is a Consultant who visited Lucan while he was in prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Shera is considered a threat to Calder and the future of humanity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Shera has spent most of the last seven years inside the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Shera is a Soulbound without her Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Shera has Mason training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Shera feels the Emperor's Intent as bands of iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Shera spent a week in Lucan's cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Shera is a person who can slit a man's throat and use the same knife to cut meat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Shera returned to her own body after the Reading ended.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Shera's shear was given Intent by Jarelys Teach and Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Shera held the Heart of Nakothi on a chain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Shera was aimed and released like an arrow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Shera has stolen power from a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Shera fell asleep on the hard wood of the deck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Shera was confused by the term 'Guild Head'.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Shera is known as the Killer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Shera is of the Consultant’s Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Shera wears pale gray clothing with a gray hood and cloth covering her mouth and nose.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Shera has a Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Shera killed Urzaia and kidnapped Jerri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Shera is a hooded individual standing to the left of Estyr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Shera is unarmed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Shera is the Guild Head of the Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Shera has dark hair and ice-cold eyes with crushing depths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Shera has a line of blood drawn across her cheek.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Shera was pulled back into the mist by a thorny vine made of golden light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Shera is a Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Shera's mentality is perceived as pure chaos, appearing as if three people are living in her body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Shera wields a blue blade in her right hand and a glowing green blade in her left.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Shera unsealed her second Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Shera is a double Soulbound with the strength to deflect a Champion's blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Shera is of the Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Shera killed Calder by plunging a dagger into him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Shera watched Calder with cold, dark eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Shera has an ally named Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri has dreams of Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — If Shera had removed Kelarac, the Independents would have taken over the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Calder intends to use the Optasia to find and punish Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Calder wants to get even with Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Shera uses a green dagger to fight Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Shera wears a hooded gray outfit and a half-mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Calder released his grip on Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Shera wears a mask of gray cloth covering the lower half of her face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Shera has short black hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Shera carries daggers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Shera claims to have killed Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Shera is present with Calder and the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Shera is nearby as indicated by silver mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Something may have happened to Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Shera's eyes reminded Calder of a shark's.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Shera holds the title of Mistress of the Mists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Shera is being forced to act as a Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The room Shera is in is invested and alchemically sealed against eavesdropping.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Shera plucked a jar from Nathanael Bareius's hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Shera is wounded in the leg by a gunshot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Shera is an Independent Guild leader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Shera is a member of the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Shera is an Architect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — The High Council pushed Shera to kill the Emperor sooner than planned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Shera is capable of killing Calder Marten in many ways even while unarmed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Shera prepared to drop from the edge of a wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Shera uses the power of Bastion's Veil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Shera is a character who uses Bastion and can see through the Veil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Shera's body is sick and tender.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Shera threatened the group with a thousand lashes and being drawn and quartered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Shera encouraged Lucan to free the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Shera has served the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Shera asks how to open the coffins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Shera is a Soulbound with two Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Shera carries Syphren in her left hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Shera was trailing behind the Mason.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Shera was trained in the Garden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Shera uses a hooded quicklamp for light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Shera is wounded by gunfire in her shoulder, stomach, and left arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Shera's right ear is missing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Shera is a character who uses the Soulbound power of Bastion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Shera wears a gray, hooded outfit that is both designed and invested for protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Shera's Soulbound power creates a cage of Soulbound Intent using thorny vines and gold light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Shera uses Syphren.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — Shera used a gas bomb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Shera hoped for a better result at the Emperor's Stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Shera killed Calder on behalf of the Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Shera feels that victory in the Guild War brought many new responsibilities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Shera retains the title of Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Shera had previously taken several bullets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Shera recognizes she is in a unique position to direct the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Shera is fighting a Great Elder tomorrow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Shera has Vessels that experience urges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera uses her Vessels and the green blade to fight the Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera realized the light was coming from Hightower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera channels life absorbed from her Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera uses Bastion to ward off the Elder's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera compresses the silver mist of Bastion’s Veil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera's body was cleansed by a golden light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera froze an inch from Darius' chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera grabbed Meia's head to prevent her from looking at the celestial figures clashing in the void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Shera personally stabbed Kelarac in the back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Shera wondered why the Guild Heads cared about a man's survival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera and the rest of the mortals crammed as many allies on their ships as possible.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera has an army of Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera wondered if Bareius, Calder Marten, and Jyrine had planned to betray her to the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera has energy she took from Kelarac.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Shera possesses a Great Elder's power inside her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Shera has twin Vessels.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
